source_display: Friends of Next Play AI Productivity Workshop
evidence: A public workshop on 'Fundamentals of AI Productivity' led by Vrijen Attawar (Careerspan co-founder/CEO), Logan Currie (Careerspan co-founder), and Ben Guo (Zo Computer co-founder).
Ben introduced Zo Computer as a managed, secure alternative to Claude code that provides AI with its own computing environment. Joint workshop with Careerspan.
